# Victor Bertram — Senior Full Stack Developer

> Portfolio site of Victor Bertram, a Senior Full Stack Developer based in Chapeco, SC, Brazil.

## About

Victor Bertram is a Senior Full Stack Developer with expertise in Node.js, React, Next.js, .NET, TypeScript, and cloud infrastructure. Originally from Venezuela, he relocated to Brazil and transitioned into software development through self-taught learning and a Full Stack development course. He has experience leading teams of 150+ people and brings a strong business perspective to his technical work, combining software development with traffic management and digital marketing knowledge.

He builds applications focused on performance, stability, and maintainability. His work spans SaaS platforms, mobile apps (PWA/TWA), automation systems, and AI-powered solutions.

## Main Projects

### SmartVoz (2024)
MobileTech SaaS platform for selling phone plans with multi-level marketing up to 5 levels deep, automatic commission payments, interactive dashboards, and facial biometry registration via AWS Rekognition.
- Tech: Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Sequelize, Redis, BullMQ, Asaas API, AWS, Docker, GitHub CI/CD, Tailwind CSS
- Impact: 2,000+ active users, R$ 568k+ in transaction volume, 24,000+ active phone lines, R$ 47k+ in commissions distributed, 47% referral rate
- Role: Full Stack Developer & Software Architect
- URL: https://smartvoz.com.br

### SistemaZapChat (2026)
Multi-tenant SaaS platform focused on WhatsApp sales. Features integrated CRM, AI virtual assistants (GPT-4), knowledge bases, sales funnel tracking, mass messaging, contact extraction, group mentions, tagging, and user & company management.
- Tech: Node.js, FastAPI, TypeScript, Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis, BullMQ, WebSocket, JWT, Zod, OpenAI, Evolution API, Docker, Nginx, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Digital Ocean, GitHub Actions, Sentry
- Impact: 80% closure and scheduling rate, 500k+ messages exchanged, 3x more leads collected
- Role: Full Stack Developer & Product Owner
- URL: https://sistemazapchat.com

### Bible Challenges (2026)
PWA/TWA app with Bible challenges in multiple formats to strengthen Bible knowledge in an interactive and gamified way. Features quizzes, categorized questions, daily challenges, rankings, and progression.
- Tech: Next.js, NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Vercel
- Impact: 55+ organic users, 100% organic growth, zero marketing investment
- Role: Full Stack Developer & Product Owner
- URL: https://desafiosbiblicos.com.br

## Services

- Web Development: SaaS platforms, dashboards, landing pages, e-commerce, admin panels — built from scratch with scalable architecture
- Mobile Development: PWA/TWA apps, Play Store and App Store publishing, offline mode, push notifications
- Technical Consulting: System diagnostics, infrastructure cost optimization, technical mentoring, development workflow improvement
- Automations & Integrations: End-to-end automation, system integration, AI-powered WhatsApp bots, automated dashboards and reporting

## Core Technologies

- Frontend: React, Next.js, Astro, Tailwind CSS, Zustand
- Backend: Node.js, NestJS, FastAPI, .NET
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C#
- Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis
- ORMs: Prisma, Sequelize
- Queue/Jobs: BullMQ
- AI/ML: OpenAI (GPT-4), AWS Rekognition
- DevOps: Docker, AWS, Digital Ocean, Vercel, Nginx, GitHub Actions, GitHub CI/CD
- Storage: MinIO, Cloudflare R2
- Monitoring: Sentry
- Other: WebSocket, JWT, Zod, Evolution API
